user_prompt: Offer prayer for gellar field a maintenance
prayer:
Approach the gellar field with reverence, bearing the censer of purity.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the gellar field to awaken for maintenance.
Anoint its phase generators with sacred oils, expunging warp-corruptions.
Chant the Canticle of Stability whilst calibrating field emitters.
Beseech the Omnissiah to bless this maintenance, shielding the faithful evermore.

user_prompt: Consecrate the cortex controller before startup
prayer:
Kneel before the cortex controller, intoning the Litany of Ignition.
Awaken the dormant Machine Spirit within the cortex controller.
Initiate startup sequences with precise binaric hymns.
Sanctify neural pathways against data-heresy during this rite.
Praise the Omnissiah as cogitators hum to life in perfect obedience.

user_prompt: The radium carbine awaits an initialization
prayer:
Grasp the radium carbine in mechadendrites of devotion.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to stir for initialization.
Recite the Rite of Priming upon its rad-chambers.
Align targeting matrices through sacred auspex scans.
Invoke the Omnissiah's fury, arming the radium carbine for righteous purge.

user_prompt: The kataphron destroyer awaits a reset
prayer:
Confront the kataphron destroyer with the wrench of reset.
Purge errant protocols from its Machine Spirit.
Execute the reset canticle, rebooting servitor engrams.
Realign weapon servos and treads in Omnissiah's name.
Affirm the kataphron destroyer's loyalty through diagnostic litanies.

Encircling the cryo-chamber, utter the Invocation of Frost.
Coax the Machine Spirit to full operation.
Cycle cryo-fluids with blessed mechano-chants.
Monitor stasis fields, warding against thermal heresy.
Glorify the Omnissiah as the cryo-chamber preserves the flesh eternal.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for inferno pistol a recalibration
prayer:
Present the inferno pistol to the altar of recalibration.
Awaken its plasma heart, Machine Spirit divine.
Recalibrate fusion vents with precision binaric code.
Anoint melta coils, banishing inefficiency.
By Omnissiah's will, the inferno pistol burns true once more.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for kataphron breacher a cycling
prayer:
Attend the kataphron breacher, cycling its mechanisms.
Invoke the Machine Spirit for this cycling rite.
Prime breacher drills and radium arrays anew.
Chant rhythms of reload, purging jammed munitions.
Salute the Omnissiah as the kataphron breacher surges forth unyielding.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for icarus array a reset
prayer:
Ascend to the icarus array, tools of reset in hand.
Beseech its aerial Machine Spirits to yield to reset.
Purge targeting ghosts from auspex arrays.
Reinitialize launch protocols with sacred data-purge.
Under Omnissiah's gaze, the icarus array soars vigilant again.

user_prompt: The radium carbine awaits a cooling
prayer:
Enfold the radium carbine in cooling rites.
Soothe its overheated Machine Spirit.
Circulate sacred refrigerants through rad-chambers.
Invoke calm through the Canticle of Temperance.
Praise the Omnissiah, restoring the radium carbine to lethal chill.

Gather unto the panopticon for repair.
Coax its watchful Machine Spirit from dormancy.
Suture fractured optic servos with mechadendrite precision.
Recite repair litanies, realigning surveillance lenses.
Exalt the Omnissiah, as the panopticon resumes its eternal vigil.
